---
name: Technical debt
about: Please report technical improvements that might need to get addressed

---

<!---
Before proceeding, please make sure that:

- the title is well defined;
- the appropriate labels are added.
--->

**Description:** this should contain an overview of the tech debt.

## Context

Why does this tech debt exist? Please, point out when possible:

- where are the issues in the code;
- when and why was this done (preferably indicating a PR).

## Possible solutions

If you already know some way to fix this or at least what should be taken into consideration, please, add your input here.
